name: MouseMoveResizeWindows
description: Modifier + mouse drag to move/resize the focused window from anywhere in its rect — no need to aim for the title bar or a corner. Right-drag resizes the closest edge.
author: Cato Kolås <cato.kolas@gmail.com>

config.label: Drag modifier
config.description: Hold these modifiers and left-drag to move the window, right-drag to resize the closest edge.

config.label: Raise window first
config.description: Focus and raise the target window at the start of each drag.
